title: Neural Network Self-Explanation
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for visualizing neural networks explaining their own attention, training, denoising, routing, and retrieval processes.

en.title: Neural Network Self-Explanation
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for visualizing neural networks explaining their own attention, training, denoising, routing, and retrieval processes.

zh-CN.title: 神经网络自解释图 · AI 画自己
zh-CN.description: 神经网络自解释图：用学术级节点连线、数据流、装置摄影和抽象注释表现注意力、反向传播、扩散去噪等过程。
